change: Further retuned resident GGUF Q8_0 T16 WMMA prefill default tile selection for small shared-expert shapes: in=2048,out=512 and in=512,out=2048 use TN16 on rows > 512 while preserving the previous TN32 policy for 512-row primary chunks.

checks.hot_path_torch_or_llamacpp_import_grep: No matches for import torch or llama.cpp in gguf_q8_0_t16_prefill.py

commands.final_128k_gate: cd /home/lhl/hipEngine-gguf-tuning && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 128K/128 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-q8t16-smalltiles-128k.json
commands.guard: cd /home/lhl/hipEngine-gguf-tuning && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_repack.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_gemv_decode_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q
commands.primary_gate: cd /home/lhl/hipEngine-gguf-tuning && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 512/128 4K/128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-acceptance.json
commands.tile_policy_tests: python3 -m py_compile hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_q8_0_t16_prefill.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_wmma_prefill.py && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_wmma_prefill.py::test_gguf_q8_0_t16_prefill_default_tiles_match_t16_policy tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_wmma_prefill.py::test_p10_b4_q8_0_t16_wmma_prefill_explicit_tile_selection_matches_cpu_reference -q

hardware: GPU1 gfx1100 / AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX class, TheRock HIP 7.13

microbench_summary.rejected_rows512_full_model_variant: Applying TN16/TM64 to 512-row in2048,out512 and TN16 to 512-row in512,out2048 regressed the 512/128 full-model prefill median to 1909.506 tok/s, so the retained policy keeps rows<=512 on TN32.

notes: Retained for small primary prefill gains on both 512/128 and 4K/128 plus a min-decode improvement versus the previous default.
128K/128 remained deterministic with flat memory; its single-run prefill/decode were effectively flat/slightly lower versus the immediately previous long-context check and are not claimed improved.
